message:
fix: Make agent.go Stop() wait for pollLoop consistently with multi.go

agent.go now properly waits for pollLoop to finish in Stop(), matching
the behavior of multi.go and coordinator.go. When pollLoop isn't started
(CoordinatorURL is empty), doneCh is closed immediately in Start() so
Stop() doesn't block.

This ensures graceful shutdown - resources aren't freed while pollLoop
might still be accessing them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
